positive: A whimsical, stylized celestial scene: a detailed forest canopy intersecting with the rings of a stylized planet and blooming cosmic flowers. The main subject is a cluster of interconnected, bioluminescent mushrooms and gentle, sweeping nebula curves. Use a deep indigo and emerald palette, highlighted by pops of iridescent cyan and gold leaf accents. The style should be neo-Art Deco mixed with whimsical botanical etching, designed with clean, strong silhouettes suitable for a repeating pattern or central focus on apparel. High contrast, golden ratio composition, highly detailed vector-art quality, printed on a cream background.
